summary: Completed testing of new phone and social media fields feature. Backend API tests: 12/12 passed. Frontend Admin Settings: All 5 new fields (phone, facebookUrl, twitterUrl, youtubeUrl, whatsappNumber) found and working with persistence. Landing page: All 6 social icons displayed correctly when config data is present.

integration_issues.flow: Config ID mismatch between Admin Settings and Landing Page
integration_issues.issue: Admin Settings saves config to user.id (pos_0001_restaurant_478), but Landing Page fetches config using restaurantId from URL (478). These are stored as separate configs. This may be by design, but worth noting for consistency.

backend_api: PUT /api/config/ accepts all social fields in single request
GET /api/config/{restaurant_id} returns phone field after PUT
GET /api/config/{restaurant_id} returns facebookUrl field after PUT
GET /api/config/{restaurant_id} returns twitterUrl field after PUT
GET /api/config/{restaurant_id} returns youtubeUrl field after PUT
GET /api/config/{restaurant_id} returns whatsappNumber field after PUT
GET /api/config/{nonexistent_id} returns null defaults for all new fields
frontend_admin_settings: Phone Number field visible with data-testid='input-phone'
Facebook URL field visible with data-testid='input-facebookUrl'
Twitter/X URL field visible with data-testid='input-twitterUrl'
YouTube URL field visible with data-testid='input-youtubeUrl'
WhatsApp Number field visible with data-testid='input-whatsappNumber'
Save with new social fields - Settings saved successfully
frontend_landing_page: Instagram icon displayed with correct href
Facebook icon displayed with correct href
Twitter/X icon displayed with correct href
YouTube icon displayed with correct href
WhatsApp icon displayed with correct wa.me link format
Phone icon displayed with tel: link

action_items: Consider aligning config IDs between Admin Settings (uses user.id) and Landing Page (uses restaurantId from URL) for consistency - currently they store to different config documents
critical_code_review_comments: Config ID architecture: Admin saves to user.id='pos_0001_restaurant_478', Landing page fetches from restaurantId='478'. This creates two separate config documents. May need architectural decision on whether this is intended.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All new fields and social icons verified)

seed_data_creation: Updated config for restaurant_id='478' with social media test data via MongoDB for landing page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone and social media fields feature complete. Backend AppConfigUpdate model has new fields: phone, facebookUrl, twitterUrl, youtubeUrl, whatsappNumber. GET /api/config/{id} returns defaults with null for these fields. Admin Settings Branding tab has all input fields with proper data-testid attributes. Landing page social icons section displays all configured links (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, YouTube, WhatsApp, Phone). WhatsApp uses wa.me/{number_digits_only} format. NOTE: Admin settings saves to user.id (pos_0001_restaurant_478), landing page at /478 fetches config from '478' - these are separate configs. Test data was inserted into '478' config for landing page testing.
